entity.summary: Polygon automated-market-maker exchange and yield-farming protocol launched in June 2022. Historical first-party materials remain available, but the original application is no longer reliably reachable and current market tracking shows no active trading volume.
entity.notes: This record covers the Polygon protocol sourced by DefiLlama, not the unrelated Aura Network AMM at auraswap.io or the earlier Fantom product listed by some databases. No definitive shutdown announcement or exact terminal date was recovered, so the entity is inactive with death_date null.

events.title: AuraSwap launched on Polygon
events.description: AuraSwap opened its Polygon AMM exchange and yield-farming protocol through a fair launch without a presale or premine.
events.notes: The exact date and time were announced by the project and post-launch distribution material confirms public operation.

evidence.title: Introducing AuraSwap
evidence.notes: First-party announcement schedules the Polygon fair launch for June 24, 2022 at 13:00 UTC and defines the AMM and farming product.

evidence.title: Airdrop event by AuraSwap
evidence.notes: First-party launch campaign schedules distribution after the June 24 exchange launch and preserves the same Polygon protocol identity.

evidence.title: AuraSwap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies AuraSwap as a Polygon AMM and yield-farming venue.

evidence.title: AuraSwap token and market profile
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies the Polygon protocol and reports no active exchange or recent trading volume for its token.

evidence.title: AuraSwap original Polygon application
evidence.notes: Archived first-party domain preserves the original Polygon exchange identity; the live application was not reliably reachable during review.
